text: Hello, yes, the kidney stones or stones anywhere in the urinary tract can cause bleeding, and an infection can also cause that. To understand your present state, I would advise you to undergo ultrasonography and intravenous biolography tests, along with routine blood and urine tests. This possibly cannot cause weight damage.
